Rollover summary
Rollover matrix

Reservation rollover policy

Reservation rollover policies matter when they explain which reserved capacity can carry forward into later windows, how rollover interacts with regional failover, and what operators should verify before production traffic depends on rollover capacity.

Useful policies also spell out rollover expiry signals, dashboard markers, and the retry controls teams should apply while rollover reservations remain active.
